prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbocharger (hybrid) with billet compressor wheel (64mm inducer, 88mm exducer) and 76mm turbine wheel, paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** for the **CZSE 4.0L V8 TFSI** engine, supporting 850+ HP on E85 with a custom **ECU Master EMU Black** standalone ECU tune (replacing the stock MED17.1.1)

Full **Forge Motorsport** cooling system overhaul: **10-row aluminum radiator** (custom core), **dual 450mm slimline oil coolers** (with thermostatic bypass), and **Audi C7 RS7-spec water-to-air intercooler** (replacing the SQ8's air-to-air unit) with **Mocal 50mm silicone hoses** and **SamcoSport clamps**

Drivetrain reinforcement with **034 Motorsport Stage 3 clutch kit** (multi-plate ceramic, 1,200 Nm capacity), **South Bend twin-disc clutch** (for track use), **Audi R8 V10 Plus rear differential** (40:60 torque split, LSD upgrade), and **Peloquin 1.5-way differential** for the front axle, paired with **GKN VL3 driveshafts** (carbon fiber, 1,500 Nm rated)
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (SQ8-specific, 50mm rear fender flares, 30mm front), with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** (dry carbon, 2x2 twill weave) and **APR Performance GT300 rear wing** (3D-printed aluminum uprights, 1,800mm span, adjustable angle via **Motec PDM15** for dynamic drag reduction)

**Rotiform LAS-R 21x10.5 ET25 (front) / 21x12.5 ET45 (rear)** wheels (forged 3-piece, 5x130 PCD, 15mm spacer adapters), wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (295/30 R21 front, 325/30 R21 rear) with **H&R TRAK+ 25mm lowering springs** (progressive rate, 15mm drop) and **KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers** (remote reservoirs, 18-way damping adjustment)

**Full carbon fiber exterior refresh**: **Vorsteiner SQ8-specific front lip** (dry carbon, 3D-scanned), **AWE Touring Edition cat-back exhaust** (quad 102mm tips, titanium resonators), **custom LED matrix headlight delete** (replaced with **Lux H8 V4 projectors** and **Morimoto XB35 LED bulbs**), and **Audi RS Q8-style rear diffuser** (carbon fiber, integrated **Akrapović titanium exhaust tips**)
